name: klore
description: LLM Wiki Knowledge Compiler — compile raw sources into an Obsidian-compatible wiki

commands.name: wiki-init
commands.description: Initialize a new klore knowledge base in the current directory

commands.name: wiki-compile
commands.description: Compile raw sources into the wiki (incremental by default)

commands.name: wiki-ingest
commands.description: Add a source file/URL and compile in one step

commands.name: wiki-ask
commands.description: Ask a question against the compiled wiki

commands.name: wiki-status
commands.description: Show compilation state and source counts

commands.name: wiki-lint
commands.description: Run health checks on the compiled wiki

commands.name: wiki-watch
commands.description: Watch raw/ for changes and auto-compile
